title: poa tshuensis
intro: Poa tshuensis, also known as Tibetan meadow grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Poa tshuensis include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Poa tshuensis is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and stems in hot water, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
